description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the java:8 Docker image with two stages: test and deploy, and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install apt-transport-https -yqq, echo "deb http://dl.bintray.com/sbt/debian /" | tee -a /etc/apt/sources.list.d/sbt.list, apt-key adv --keyserver hkp://keyserver.ubuntu.com:80 --recv 642AC823, apt-get update -yqq, apt-get install sbt -yqq, and sbt sbt-version. In the test stage add a test job that runs sbt clean compile test, uses a mongo service, and sets the JAVA_OPTS variable to -Dplayjongo.test-uri=mongodb://mongo/test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that only runs on the master branch, runs apt-get update -yq, apt-get install rubygems ruby-dev -y, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=$APP_NAME --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY to deploy to Heroku.
